welcome.title: Welcome to OpenCow
welcome.subtitle: AI-First autonomous agent platform. One Task. One Agent. Delivered.

monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Track all agent sessions and task progress across projects in a unified dashboard.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Get notified on task completions, errors, and important events.

privacy.title: Local & Private
privacy.desc: Everything runs locally. No data leaves your machine.

prerequisites.title: Environment Check
prerequisites.statusDone: Here's what we found on your system.
prerequisites.errorDetail: Something went wrong while checking prerequisites.
prerequisites.claudeOptionalDesc: You can skip this for now. After installing the Agent CLI later, set up hooks via
prerequisites.requiredMissingDesc: Please install the required items above, then click “Re-check” to continue.

disclosure.title: Before We Begin
disclosure.subtitle: Here's exactly what OpenCow will do on your system.
disclosure.opencowDirDesc: OpenCow data directory for storing events, hooks, and settings.
disclosure.eventLoggerDesc: A lightweight shell script that logs agent events to a local JSONL file.
disclosure.settingsJsonDesc: Adds hook entries to the configuration file. Your existing hooks and other settings will
disclosure.safeReversibleDesc: All OpenCow hooks are tagged and can be cleanly removed via
disclosure.safeReversibleSuffix: at any time without affecting your other configurations.

install.title: Install Hooks
install.pleaseWait: Please wait while hooks are being installed…

providerSetup.title: Connect an LLM provider
providerSetup.description: Paste an Anthropic API key to get started, or open Settings to configure OpenAI / Gemini / OAuth / other providers.
providerSetup.alreadyConfigured: Your provider configuration was imported. You can review it in Settings any time.
providerSetup.subtitle: Choose your AI service and set up the connection.
providerSetup.subscriptionHint: This will open your browser for Claude OAuth sign-in.

errors.loginFailed: Connection failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

import.title: Import Projects
import.subtitle: Select projects to import into OpenCow.
import.addLater: You can add projects later from the sidebar.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.subtitleWithClaude: OpenCow is ready. Create tasks, dispatch agents, start delivering.
done.subtitleWithoutClaude: OpenCow is set up. Start creating tasks and dispatching agents anytime.
done.providerNotConfigured: AI engine not configured yet. You can set it up anytime via Settings → Provider.

withClaude.step1Suffix: — create a task and your agent will start working automatically.
withClaude.step2: Track all agent progress and deliverables in real time from the dashboard.

withoutClaude.step1Suffix: to learn how to configure and use autonomous agents.
withoutClaude.step3: Track all agents, tasks, and deliverables in the dashboard.
